channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SETCO] Setco: SAT Stays SEBI Order Requiring ₹208.77 Cr Payment
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The Securities Appellate Tribunal (SAT) has stayed the operation of a SEBI order dated February 5, 2026, against Setco Automotive Ltd's promoters. The SEBI order required a payment of approximately ₹208.77 Crore, debarment from accessing the securities market, and imposed a penalty. The SAT stay, granted on May 8, 2026, is subject to certain conditions. The original SEBI investigation concerned financial statements from FY 2019-20 to FY 2021-22 and alleged diversion of funds to promoters via marketing commissions and preference share investments.

  • SAT stays SEBI order against Setco promoters, pending appeal.
  • SEBI order required ₹208.77 Crore payment and market debarment.
  • The appeal, No. 120 of 2026, was filed by Setco promoters.
  • SEBI alleged fund diversions via marketing commissions and investments.
  • SAT stay is conditional, as specified in its interim order.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SETCO AUTOMOTIVE LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [STEELCO] Steelco Gujarat Revises Rights Issue: ₹112/Share, Ratio 5:1
item.description:
Steelco Gujarat Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on May 9, 2026, approved revisions to the terms of its proposed Rights Issue. The company will issue up to 13,30,060 fully paid-up equity shares at ₹112 per share (including a premium of ₹102 per share), aggregating up to ₹1,489.66 Lakhs. The rights entitlement ratio is set at 5:1, with a record date of May 15, 2026. The issue opens on May 25, 2026, with the last date for on-market renunciation being May 29, 2026, and the closing date on June 4, 2026. The board also approved the appointment of Mr. Ravikant Pandey as Vice President- Operations effective May 11, 2026.

  • Steelco Gujarat revises Rights Issue terms, offering shares at ₹112 each.
  • The Rights Issue size is up to ₹1,489.66 Lakhs, with a 5:1 entitlement ratio.
  • Record date for the Rights Issue is set for May 15, 2026.
  • Issue opens May 25, 2026, and closes June 4, 2026.
  • Ravikant Pandey appointed as Vice President- Operations, effective May 11, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Steelco Gujarat Ltd | Category: Rights Issue

item.title: [SUERYAAKNI] Sueryaa Knitwear Appoints Vishnu Agarwal as Additional Director
item.description:
Sueryaa Knitwear Ltd has announced the appointment of Mr. Vishnu Agarwal as an Additional Non-Executive Independent Director. This appointment follows the announcement made on May 8, 2026. The company has also enclosed the disclosure received from Mr. Agarwal pursuant to Regulation 7(1)(b) read with Regulation 6(2) of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

  • Vishnu Agarwal appointed as Additional Non-Executive Independent Director.
  • Appointment effective after announcement on May 8, 2026.
  • DIN of Vishnu Agarwal is 09485015.
  • Disclosure received as per SEBI Insider Trading Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sueryaa Knitwear Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [LENSKART] Lenskart Grants 347,000 Stock Options Under ESOP 2021
item.description:
Lenskart Solutions Limited has granted 347,000 employee stock options to eligible employees under its Employee Stock Option Plan 2021, as approved by the Nomination and Remuneration Committee on May 8, 2026. Each option converts into one equity share with a face value of ₹2. The exercise price is ₹389 per share, determined by the average closing price 30 days prior to the grant, with a maximum discount of 25%.

  • Lenskart grants 347,000 employee stock options under ESOP 2021.
  • Exercise price is ₹389 per share, based on a 30-day average.
  • Options can be exercised after vesting while employed with the company.
  • Each option converts into one equity share with ₹2 face value.
  • The scheme adheres to SEBI (SBEB) Regulations, 2021.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Lenskart Solutions Ltd | Category: ESOP

item.title: [NRINTER] NR International: No Encumbrance on Shares for FY26
item.description:
NR International Ltd. has declared that no encumbrance has been created on the shares held by the Promoter(s)/Promoter Group, directly or indirectly, during the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This disclosure is made under Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • NR International confirms no new encumbrance on promoter shares.
  • Disclosure made under SEBI (SAST) Regulations 31(4).
  • Confirmation pertains to FY ended March 31, 2026.
  • Promoter Group shares remain unencumbered as previously disclosed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NR International Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [BAJAJELEC] Bajaj Electricals: Appellate Authority Upholds ₹2.69 Cr GST Demand
item.description:
Bajaj Electricals Ltd. received an appellate order dated May 8, 2026, from the Appellate Authority & Additional Commissioner of Revenue, State Tax, Large Taxpayer Unit, West Bengal, upholding the assessment order for an aggregate demand of ₹2.69 crore, including a general penalty of ₹0.14 crore. The original demand was raised by the GST Authority under Section 73 of the West Bengal Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017, and the Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017, due to alleged liability under Reverse Charge Mechanism and mismatch in input tax credit claimed for FY 2020-21. Bajaj Electricals is evaluating legal remedies, including filing an appeal or initiating writ proceedings. The financial impact, if materializes, would be limited to the demand and penalty. The company states that the order has no impact on its operational or financial activities.

  • Appellate Authority upholds ₹2.69 Cr GST demand against Bajaj Electricals.
  • The demand includes a general penalty of ₹0.14 crore.
  • Bajaj Electricals is evaluating legal remedies, including appeals.
  • The demand relates to FY 2020-21 and alleged GST liability.
  • Company states no impact on operational or financial activities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BAJAJ ELECTRICALS LTD.-$ | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [APTECHT] Aptech Ltd Receives ₹6 Cr Work Order from State Government Body
item.description:
Aptech Ltd has received a work order from an autonomous body under the State Government to conduct OMR Based Tests. The estimated contract value is ₹6 crores, and the project is expected to be executed by June 2026. The order does not involve any related party transactions or promoter interest in the awarding entity.

  • Aptech Ltd secured a ₹6 crore contract from a State Government autonomous body.
  • The contract involves conducting OMR Based Tests, expected to be completed by June 2026.
  • The order is from a domestic entity and does not involve related party transactions.
  • No promoter/promoter group/group companies have any interest in the entity awarding the order.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: APTECH LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [GALADA] Galada Power: FY26 Revenue from Operations at ₹1,216 Lacs
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Galada Power & Telecommunication Ltd has announced its audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Revenue from operations stood at ₹1,216 Lacs. The company is undergoing a revival process as per the resolution plan approved by NCLT. The auditors' report is unmodified, and there are no adverse remarks. The company is reviving its manufacturing facilities and sold land and buildings at Silvassa to finance the revamping.

  • Galada Power's revenue from operations for FY26 is ₹1,216 Lacs.
  • The company's financial statements are prepared on a going concern basis despite negative net worth.
  • Auditors' report for FY26 is unmodified with no adverse remarks.
  • The company is reviving its manufacturing facilities as per the NCLT-approved resolution plan.
  • K Ramalakshmi, Director, is authorized to sign the results on behalf of the Board.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GALADA POWER & TELECOMMUNICATION LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [TITANIN] Titan Intech Responds to Exchange Query on Price Movement
item.description:
Titan Intech Ltd clarified to the exchange that it is compliant with SEBI's Listing Regulations and has been disclosing all material information in a timely manner. The company stated that the recent increase in its share price appears to be market-driven and not attributable to any action or omission by the company. Titan Intech reiterated its commitment to transparency and compliance with regulatory requirements.

  • Titan Intech confirms compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations.
  • Company states price surge is market-driven, not company-initiated.
  • Titan Intech commits to maintaining transparency and timely disclosures.
  • Clarification issued in response to exchange communication dated 08 May 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Titan Intech Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [GCSL] Gretex Corporate Services Signs Mandate with Ferro Alloys Company
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Gretex Corporate Services Ltd has signed a mandate with a Ferro Alloys company based in West Bengal, according to a regulatory filing. The company is planning to get listed on either the SME Platform of BSE or the Emerge Platform of NSE.

  • Gretex Corporate Services signs mandate with Ferro Alloys company.
  • The Ferro Alloys company is based in West Bengal.
  • The company plans to list on BSE SME or NSE Emerge platform.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gretex Corporate Services Ltd | Category: Business Update
